title: Snake Museum game metadata
description: Schema for a game's meta.json. Every games/<slug>/meta.json must validate against this.

githubHandle.description: Author's GitHub username (no @). Used to link back to their profile.

description.description: A short blurb shown on the game's card.

createdAt.description: Submission/creation date as an ISO 8601 date (YYYY-MM-DD).

tags.description: Lowercase-ish keywords used for filtering (e.g. classic, arcade, hard).
